scope: UC Berkeley Mathematics senate faculty, with applied-mathematics-tagged faculty separated where applicable

entries.name: Jennifer Chayes
entries.education_history: B.A. in Biology and Physics, Wesleyan University; Ph.D. in Mathematical Physics, Princeton University.
entries.work_professional_background: Associate Provost of the Division of Computing, Data Science, and Society and Dean of the School of Information at UC Berkeley; Professor of EECS, Mathematics, Statistics, and Information at Berkeley; previously Professor of Mathematics at UCLA and worked at Microsoft Research for 23 years, including as Technical Fellow and Managing Director of Microsoft Research New England, New York City, and Montreal.
entries.primary_research_areas: Probability theory, graph theory, graphons, mathematical statistical physics, machine learning, phase transitions in computer science, and network science

entries.name: Sylvie Corteel
entries.work_professional_background: UC Berkeley Department of Mathematics faculty, year appointed 2017.

entries.name: David Eisenbud
entries.work_professional_background: UC Berkeley Department of Mathematics faculty, year appointed 1997.

entries.name: Steven N. Evans
entries.work_professional_background: Distinguished Professor at UC Berkeley with appointments in Mathematics and Statistics, year appointed in Mathematics 1987; affiliated with the Center for Computational Biology.
entries.primary_research_areas: Probability and stochastic processes, random combinatorial structures, superprocesses and other measure-valued processes, probability on algebraic structures, and applications to biodemography, finance, population genetics, phylogenetics, and historical linguistics

entries.work_professional_background: UC Berkeley Department of Mathematics faculty, year appointed 2000.

entries.name: Venkatesan Guruswami
entries.education_history: B.Tech., Indian Institute of Technology Madras (1997); Ph.D., Massachusetts Institute of Technology (2001).
entries.work_professional_background: Professor of Mathematics at UC Berkeley since 2022, with appointments in EECS and as Director of the Simons Institute for the Theory of Computing; previously Miller Research Fellow at UC Berkeley and held faculty positions in Computer Science at the University of Washington and Carnegie Mellon University.
entries.primary_research_areas: Theory of computing, error-correcting codes, combinatorics and discrete mathematics, algebra and computation, approximate optimization, computational complexity, and randomness in computing

entries.name: Lin Lin (林霖)
entries.education_history: B.S. in Mathematics, Peking University (2007); Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics, Princeton University (2011).
entries.work_professional_background: Luis W. Alvarez Postdoctoral Fellow, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (2011-2013); Research Scientist, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (2013-2014); Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor of Mathematics at UC Berkeley (2014-present); concurrent Faculty Scientist and later Senior Faculty Scientist at Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory; Professor of Chemistry by courtesy at UC Berkeley (2025-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Numerical analysis, quantum chemistry, and quantum algorithms for quantum many-body problems

entries.name: Michael J. Lindsey
entries.education_history: B.S. in Mathematics with Honors, Stanford University (2015); Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics, University of California, Berkeley (2019).
entries.work_professional_background: NSF Postdoctoral Fellow, Courant Institute of Mathematical Sciences, New York University (2019-2022); Assistant Professor of Mathematics, UC Berkeley (2022-present); Faculty Scientist, Applied Mathematics and Computational Research Division, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (2023-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Numerical analysis, optimization, Monte Carlo methods, and computational methods for quantum many-body problems

entries.name: James A. Sethian
entries.education_history: B.A., Princeton University (1976); M.A. in Mathematics, University of California, Berkeley (1978); Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics, University of California, Berkeley (1982).
entries.work_professional_background: NSF Postdoctoral Fellow, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (1982-1984); NSF Postdoctoral Fellow, Courant Institute of Mathematical Sciences, NYU (1984-1985); Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor of Mathematics at UC Berkeley (1985-present); Senior Scientist and later department head in the Mathematics Department at Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (1996-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Applied mathematics, scientific computing, level set methods, partial differential equations, and geometry-driven computation

entries.name: Maciej Zworski
entries.education_history: B.Sc. studies, Imperial College London (1982-1983); S.B. in Mathematics, Massachusetts Institute of Technology (1985); Ph.D. in Mathematics, Massachusetts Institute of Technology (1989).
entries.work_professional_background: Benjamin Peirce Lecturer, Harvard University (1989-1992); Associate Professor and then Professor, Johns Hopkins University (1992-1996); Professor, University of Toronto (1995-2000); Professor of Mathematics, UC Berkeley (1998-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Mathematical analysis, spectral theory, scattering resonances, semiclassical analysis, and applications to quantum chaos
